title: Image not displaying due to incorrect URL
symptom: Images are not displayed correctly in the application, while other text data appears fine.
not_this_if: Images display correctly in other contexts
root_cause: The issue arises when the URL used for the image is not the direct link to the image file, but rather a link to the webpage containing the image. This prevents WeWeb from fetching and displaying the image properly.
fix_steps: Right-click on the image and select 'Copy Image Address'
Use the copied URL to update the image source in your Collection data
Bind the updated URL in WeWeb
agent_instruction: Update the image source with the direct image URL in your Collection data.
